# Proquoment Supplier Dashboard

> The Supplier Dashboard at supplier.proquoment.in is the manufacturer workspace for Indian suppliers using Proquoment — an AI-powered B2B procurement platform.

Built with Vite/React and Supabase realtime.

## Pages

- [Home](https://supplier.proquoment.in/home): Supplier overview and stats
- [Matched RFQs](https://supplier.proquoment.in/matched-rfqs): Buyer RFQs matched to your categories
- [My Bids](https://supplier.proquoment.in/my-bids): Track submitted quotations
- [Quote Submission](https://supplier.proquoment.in/quote-submission): AI-assisted quote chat
- [Messages](https://supplier.proquoment.in/messages): Chat with admin
- [Analytics](https://supplier.proquoment.in/analytics): Bid win rate and performance
- [Product Catalogue](https://supplier.proquoment.in/product-catalogue): Manage product listings
- [Sample Orders](https://supplier.proquoment.in/sample-orders): Handle buyer sample requests
- [Bulk Orders](https://supplier.proquoment.in/bulk-orders): Manage confirmed bulk orders
- [QC Inspections](https://supplier.proquoment.in/qc-inspections): Quality control records
- [Company Profile](https://supplier.proquoment.in/company-profile): Factory and certification details
- [Settings](https://supplier.proquoment.in/settings): Account configuration

## Related

- [Proquoment Platform](https://proquoment.in)
- [Buyer Sourcing Dashboard](https://buyer.proquoment.in)
- [Contact Proquoment](https://proquoment.in/contact)
